summary: OAuth access and refresh tokens stored in plaintext in SQLite — deferred to Layer 5 (Integrity) lane RL-004-credential-refactor
MCP OAuth tokens stored in mcp-auth.json as plaintext JSON with only 0o600 file permissions — deferred to Layer 5 (Integrity) lane RL-004-credential-refactor
AWS S3/R2 credentials read from process.env via non-null assertions — should use SST Secret construct. Deferred to RL-004-enterprise-secrets lane.
prepareSidecarEnv() mutates global process.env via Object.assign — affects ALL subsequent code, not just the sidecar. Deferred to RL-004-credential-refactor.
